message:
feat: add daemon state management with SQLite

Add persistent state management for tracking tasks and snapshots using
SQLite. Includes Task struct, CRUD operations, XDG-compliant data
directory, and in-memory option for testing.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
